children.heading: .—Treatment of Amounts for Conservation Banking
children.label: c .—Treatment of Amounts for Conservation Banking
children.text: Payments made under subsection (a) to a conservation banking program or “in-lieu-fee” mitigation sponsor for the purpose of facilitating military construction may be treated as eligible costs of the military construction project.
